posts.author: c.lacor (Christelle LACOR)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Please allow us to add observers in the Resource Directory (the list we can find in the account parameters, where we can add a job role, the teams, the location and the skills)

What are you trying to achieve

As we are not able to add the observers are not in the resource directory, they appear “not assigned” in the dashboard (view by location, team and job role)
